notes.note: SP is a Chrone client - Migration is scheduled for Monday - SP was busy. She didn't have the access to her profile and we have claimed it for her and she has received a post card for the verification. Meeting set for tomorrow around 9am. SP has asked to reschedule the call as she was occupied
